Jump on enemies to defeat them, avoid falling into pits, and reach the flag at the end of each level to progress. You have 3 health points - lose them all or fall into a pit and you'll restart the level. Can you master all the worlds and collect every coin? It also checks that the player doesn't fall through platforms. The test will alternate between moving left and right for short durations, allowing the physics engine to settle between movements. It will verify the player stays on the ground platform and responds to directional inputs appropriately. The player should smoothly move left and right on the ground platform without falling through. The player's position should change in response to inputs, and gravity should keep them grounded when not jumping. The test succeeds if the player remains stable and responsive for at least 300 frames. Testing the complete win condition by reaching the flag. This test navigates the player through the first level, avoiding or defeating enemies, and reaches the flag to trigger the win state. The test will move the player right continuously with strategic jumps to avoid obstacles and enemies. It will jump when near enemies to potentially land on them, and maintain forward momentum to reach the level's end flag. The player should successfully navigate to the flag at the end of the level, triggering the GAME_OVER_WIN state. The test succeeds when gameState.gamePhase changes to "GAME_OVER_WIN" within 600 frames, indicating successful level completion. Testing jump mechanics including variable jump height. This test verifies that tapping space produces a short jump while holding space produces a higher jump, and that the player can only jump when on the ground. The test will perform a series of short taps followed by longer holds of the space key, measuring the maximum height reached in each case. It will also attempt to jump while in mid-air to verify double-jumping is prevented. Short taps should produce jumps of approximately 60-80 pixels in height, while held jumps should reach 120-150 pixels. Mid-air jump attempts should have no effect. The test succeeds if jump heights are consistently different and no double-jumping occurs over 200 frames. Testing coin collection and score system. This test verifies that collecting gold coins increases the player's score and that coins disappear after collection. The test will guide the player to intentionally collide with several coins placed in the level, monitoring the score counter after each collision. Lep's Adventure

Guide Lep the leprechaun through a challenging platformer adventure! Navigate through levels filled with enemies, collect gold coins for points, and grab cloverleaves to restore health. Jump on enemies to defeat them, avoid falling into pits, and reach the flag at the end of each level to progress. You have 3 health points - lose them all or fall into a pit and you'll restart the level. Can you master all the worlds and collect every coin?

Controls: Arrow Keys (←/→): Move left and right | Space: Jump (hold for higher jump) | Enter: Start the game from the start screen | Escape: Pause/unpause during gameplay | R: Restart from game over screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic player movement and physics. This test verifies that the player can move left and right using arrow keys, and that gravity and collision with the ground work correctly. It also checks that the player doesn't fall through platforms.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will alternate between moving left and right for short durations, allowing the physics engine to settle between movements. It will verify the player stays on the ground platform and responds to directional inputs appropriately.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should smoothly move left and right on the ground platform without falling through. The player's position should change in response to inputs, and gravity should keep them grounded when not jumping. The test succeeds if the player remains stable and responsive for at least 300 frames.

TEST_2.strategy_description: The test will move the player right continuously with strategic jumps to avoid obstacles and enemies. It will jump when near enemies to potentially land on them, and maintain forward momentum to reach the level's end flag.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should successfully navigate to the flag at the end of the level, triggering the GAME_OVER_WIN state. The test succeeds when gameState.gamePhase changes to "GAME_OVER_WIN" within 600 frames, indicating successful level completion.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing jump mechanics including variable jump height. This test verifies that tapping space produces a short jump while holding space produces a higher jump, and that the player can only jump when on the ground.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The test will perform a series of short taps followed by longer holds of the space key, measuring the maximum height reached in each case. It will also attempt to jump while in mid-air to verify double-jumping is prevented.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Short taps should produce jumps of approximately 60-80 pixels in height, while held jumps should reach 120-150 pixels. Mid-air jump attempts should have no effect. The test succeeds if jump heights are consistently different and no double-jumping occurs over 200 frames.
